list.title: Events
list.subtitle: All your events
list.emptySubtitle: Create your first event and start bringing people together!

create.title: Create an event
create.subtitle: Fill in the details below to get your event live

fields.title: Event title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell your guests what to expect…

rsvp.joinDescLoggedIn: You can use a different name just for this event.
rsvp.joinDescGuest: You'll join as a guest. No account needed!
rsvp.bringGuestDesc: Enter the name of the person you're bringing.

detail.needInviteLink: You need an invite link to join
detail.draftAlert: This event is still a draft and is not accessible yet.
detail.guestListUnavailableDesc: You don't have access to the guest list.
detail.guestListDisabledDesc: The organizer has turned off the guest list for this event.
detail.guestListOrganizerDesc: Guest list is only visible to organizers.
detail.guestListAttendeeDesc: Join the event to see who else is coming.
detail.registrationsClosedAlert: Registrations are currently closed for this event.
detail.registrationsClosedDesc: The organizer has closed new registrations for this event.
detail.galleryNotAvailableDesc: Gallery opens once the event goes live.
detail.galleryDisabledDesc: The organizer has turned off the gallery for this event.
detail.galleryOrganizerDesc: Gallery is only visible to organizers.
detail.galleryAttendeeDesc: Join the event to see and share photos.

attendeeList.emptyDesc: Share the event link to get people in!

gallery.emptyUpload: Be the first to share a moment!
gallery.emptyJoin: Join the event and share a photo!
gallery.removeDesc: This photo will be permanently deleted.

join.invalidLinkDesc: This invite link doesn't exist. Ask the event organizer for a valid link.
join.waitlistDesc: We'll let you know if a spot opens up.
join.nameHelp: You can use a different name than your profile for this event.

draft.title: Event not published yet
draft.body: This event hasn't been published yet. Check back later.

event_type_changed.title: Invite link no longer active
event_type_changed.body: This event no longer accepts invite-link access. Use the public event page instead.

registrations_closed.title: Registrations are closed
registrations_closed.body: The organizer has closed new registrations for this event.

unavailable.title: Event no longer available
unavailable.body: This event has ended or been cancelled.

expired.title: Link expired
expired.body: This invite link has expired. Ask the organizer for a new one.

max_uses_reached.title: Link is full
max_uses_reached.body: This invite link has reached its limit.

settings.title: Event settings
settings.registrationsDescription: Allow new attendees and invite-link joins for this event
settings.prizesDescription: Enable the prizes feature for this event

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone
danger.deleteSubtitle: All attendees, media, and data will be permanently removed
danger.deleteDescNormal: This will permanently delete {{title}} and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
danger.deleteDescCancelled: This will permanently delete {{title}} and all associated data including attendees, messages, and media. This action cannot be undone.
danger.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event? This action cannot be undone.
danger.blockedPublished: Cancel the event before deleting it.
danger.blockedActive: You cannot delete a live event.

inviteLinks.createDescription: All fields are optional. Leave them blank to create a simple unlimited link.
inviteLinks.description: Anyone with a link can join. Create multiple links to track different groups.
inviteLinks.emptyDescription: Create one to start inviting people.
inviteLinks.label: Label

guestList.empty: No users on the guest list

attendees.title: Attendees
attendees.description: View and manage all event attendees
attendees.removeDesc: Remove {{name}} from this event? They won't be notified.

about.title: About & Access
about.description: Title, description and who can join
about.accessLocked: Access type and capacity can only be changed while the event is still a draft.
about.privateAccessWarning: Changing this event to private will change {{targets}} access from Anyone to Attendees only.

when.title: When
when.rescheduledWarning: Changing the start date will automatically mark this event as Rescheduled and notify attendees.

shareLink.title: Share link
shareLink.description: Send this to anyone you want to invite

cover.title: Cover image
cover.description: Upload a cover image for your event

accessType.INVITE_LINK_description: Guests need a link to join

toPublished.label: Publish
toPublished.description: Make the event visible and open for registrations

toActiveFromRescheduled.label: Go live
toActiveFromRescheduled.description: Event will go live at the new scheduled time

cancelFromDraft.title: Cancel event?
cancelFromDraft.description: This event will be cancelled. Attendees will no longer be able to join.

cancelFromPublished.title: Cancel event?
cancelFromPublished.description: This event will be cancelled. All registered attendees will lose access.

cancelFromRescheduled.title: Cancel event?
cancelFromRescheduled.description: This event will be cancelled. All registered attendees will lose access.

cancelFromActive.title: Cancel live event?
cancelFromActive.description: The event is currently live. Cancelling will immediately stop it for all attendees.

endEvent.title: End event?
endEvent.description: This will conclude the event. Attendees will no longer be able to join or interact.

ANYONE.label: Anyone
ANYONE.description: Anyone can view the attendee list

ATTENDEES_ONLY.label: Attendees only
ATTENDEES_ONLY.description: Only registered attendees can see the list

ORGANIZERS_ONLY.label: Organizers only
ORGANIZERS_ONLY.description: Only event staff can see the list

DISABLED.label: Disabled
DISABLED.description: Guest list is hidden from everyone

ANYONE.label: Anyone
ANYONE.description: Anyone can view and upload photos
